text:
You are working on beads issue str-1fr: "Cache invalidation when function dependencies change"

## Issue Details
When a function's callees have changed (even if the function's own source hasn't), invalidate the cache and re-explore. Use the call graph to track transitive dependencies. Requires per-function fingerprinting foundation.

Depends on str-cw3 (per-function result caching keyed by content hash - done).

## WORKTREE SETUP — RUN FIRST
Before doing anything else, create and enter an isolated worktree:
```bash
REPO_ROOT="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)"
BRANCH_NAME="str-1fr"
WORKTREE_DIR="$REPO_ROOT/.claude/worktrees/$BRANCH_NAME"

if [ -d "$WORKTREE_DIR" ]; then
  echo "Worktree already exists, reusing"
else
  git worktree add "$WORKTREE_DIR" -b "$BRANCH_NAME"
fi

cd "$WORKTREE_DIR"
```
Verify you are in the right place:
```bash
echo "CWD: $(pwd)"
echo "Branch: $(git branch --show-current)"
echo "$(pwd)" | grep -q '\.claude/worktrees/' && echo "WORKTREE VERIFIED" || echo "FATAL: NOT in a worktree"
```
If verification fails, STOP and report the error to the team lead.

ALL subsequent commands must run from this worktree directory.
NEVER cd back to the main repo directory. Commit and push ONLY on your worktree branch — never touch main.

## Instructions
1. Follow CLAUDE.md and AGENTS.md conventions
2. Read the existing cache module (from str-cw3) and call_graph module to understand current implementation
3. Extend the cache to track callee dependencies (transitive)
4. When checking cache validity, also check if any callee's content hash has changed
5. Add unit tests and proptest coverage
6. Run quality gates: `cargo test` and `cargo clippy -- -D warnings` in shatter-core
7. Run `/pre-completion` before reporting done — include its output in your completion message
8. Push your branch: `git push -u origin HEAD`

When done, mark task #3 as completed via TaskUpdate and send a message to the team lead.

Requires per-function fingerprinting foundation (str-cw3 done). Run /pre-completion before reporting done.","assignedBy":"str-1fr","timestamp":"2026-03-07T23:28:14.147Z"}

{"type":"permission_response","request_id":"perm-1772926096634-ikxwmq7","subtype":"success","response":{"updated_input":{"command":"REPO_ROOT=\"$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)\" && BRANCH_NAME=\"str-1fr\" && WORKTREE_DIR=\"$REPO_ROOT/.claude/worktrees/$BRANCH_NAME\" && if [ -d \"$WORKTREE_DIR\" ]; then echo \"Worktree already exists, reusing\"; else git worktree add \"$WORKTREE_DIR\" -b \"$BRANCH_NAME\"; fi && cd \"$WORKTREE_DIR\" && echo \"CWD: $(pwd)\" && echo \"Branch: $(git branch --show-current)\" && echo \"$(pwd)\" | grep -q '\\.claude/worktrees/' && echo \"WORKTREE VERIFIED\" || echo \"FATAL: NOT in a worktree\"","description":"Set up git worktree for str-1fr branch"},"permission_updates":[]}}

{"type":"permission_response","request_id":"perm-1772927042655-qtntoxf","subtype":"success","response":{"updated_input":{"command":"git add shatter-core/src/fingerprint.rs shatter-core/src/spec.rs shatter-cli/src/main.rs && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
feat: cross-file dependency-aware cache invalidation

Extend compute_deep_fingerprints() to accept external callee fingerprints
from cache, so cross-file dependency changes propagate to callers'
fingerprints. Previously only intra-file dependencies were tracked,
meaning a function calling a cross-file callee would stay "fresh" even
when the callee changed.

Changes:
- fingerprint.rs: Add external_fingerprints param, seed deep FP map with
  cached cross-file callee FPs, use unfiltered callee sets for deep FP
  computation, filter return map to only local functions
- spec.rs: Thread external_fingerprints through compute_incremental_plan()
- main.rs: Add load_external_fingerprints() helper that loads cached
  behavior map fingerprints for cross-file deps; wire into explore and
  stale commands; add --cache-dir and --no-cache flags to stale command

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"","description":"Commit changes"},"permission_updates":[]}}

{"type":"permission_response","request_id":"perm-1772928951081-piae70r","subtype":"success","response":{"updated_input":{"command":"git push -u origin HEAD","description":"Push branch to origin"},"permission_updates":[]}}

{"type":"permission_response","request_id":"perm-1772928960268-b2bxui2","subtype":"success","response":{"updated_input":{"command":"echo \"=== Quality Gates ===\" && echo \"--- cargo test (shatter-core lib) ---\" && cargo test -p shatter-core --lib 2>&1 | tail -3 && echo \"--- cargo test (shatter-cli) ---\" && cargo test -p shatter-cli 2>&1 | tail -3 && echo \"--- cargo clippy ---\" && cargo clippy -p shatter-core -p shatter-cli -- -D warnings 2>&1 | tail -3 && echo \"--- git status ---\" && git status --short && echo \"--- git log ---\" && git log --oneline -3","timeout":300000,"description":"Run pre-completion quality gates"},"permission_updates":[]}}
